script.name: CreateHistoryObjectObserverTableType
CreateHistoryObjectTableType
CreateHistoryUpdateQueueItemTableType

procedure.name: UpdateCachedHistoryObjects

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: DELETE FROM &&HistoryObjectObserver&& hoo WHERE &&Parent&& LIKE :likeCondition OR &&Child&& LIKE :likeCondition RETURNING hoo.&&Parent&&;

WITH cte AS ( SELECT * FROM &&HistoryUpdateQueueItem&& h WHERE &&ServerConnectionUid&& IS NULL AND &&Attempt&& < :attemptLength AND &&NextUpdateDate&& <= :currentTimestamp ORDER BY &&Attempt&& DESC, &&CreationDate&& ASC LIMIT :count FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE &&HistoryUpdateQueueItem&& huqi SET &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid, &&LastUpdateDate&& = :currentTimestamp FROM cte WHERE huqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&& RETURNING cte.*

WITH cte AS ( SELECT &&Id&& FROM &&HistoryUpdateQueueItem&& WHERE &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE &&HistoryUpdateQueueItem&& huqi SET &&ServerConnectionUid&& = null FROM cte WHERE huqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&&

procedure.name: HistoryObjectObserversUpsert
procedure.text:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION &&HistoryObjectObserversUpsert&&(tvp json) RETURNS void AS $$ DECLARE tvpTable &&HistoryObjectObserverTableType&&[]; BEGIN SELECT array_agg(dataTable::&&HistoryObjectObserverTableType&&) FROM json_populate_recordset(null::&&HistoryObjectObserverTableType&&, tvp) AS dataTable INTO tvpTable;
INSERT INTO &&HistoryObjectObserver&& (&&Parent&&, &&Child&&) SELECT &&Parent&&, &&Child&& FROM unnest(tvpTable) AS tvpTable WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM &&HistoryObjectObserver&& WHERE &&Parent&& = tvpTable.&&Parent&& AND &&Child&& = tvpTable.&&Child&& FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED); END $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

procedure.name: HistoryObjectsUpsert
procedure.text:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION &&HistoryObjectsUpsert&&(tableName text, tvp json) RETURNS void AS $$ DECLARE tvpTable &&HistoryObjectTableType&&[]; BEGIN SELECT array_agg(dataTable::&&HistoryObjectTableType&&) FROM json_populate_recordset(null::&&HistoryObjectTableType&&, tvp) AS dataTable INTO tvpTable;
EXECUTE 'INSERT INTO ' || tableName || ' (&&Id&&, &&Uid&&, &&Object&&, &&Model&&, &&ActionDate&&, &&ActionTypeUid&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&EventArgsUid&&, &&SessionUid&&, &&UnitOfWorkUid&&, &&IsRelatedevent&&) SELECT &&Id&&, &&Uid&&, &&Object&&, &&Model&&, &&ActionDate&&, &&ActionTypeUid&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&EventArgsUid&&, &&SessionUid&&, &&UnitOfWorkUid&&, (&&IsRelatedEvent&&::int)::smallint FROM unnest($1) AS tvpTable WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ' || tableName || ' WHERE &&Id&& = tvpTable.&&Id&& FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED);' USING tvpTable; END $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

procedure.name: HistoryUpdateQueueItemsUpsert
procedure.text:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION &&HistoryUpdateQueueItemsUpsert&&(tvp json) RETURNS void AS $$ DECLARE tvpTable &&HistoryUpdateQueueItemTableType&&[]; BEGIN SELECT array_agg(dataTable::&&HistoryUpdateQueueItemTableType&&) FROM json_populate_recordset(null::&&HistoryUpdateQueueItemTableType&&, tvp) AS dataTable INTO tvpTable;
INSERT INTO &&HistoryUpdateQueueItem&& (&&Id&&, &&ObjectId&&, &&ObjectTypeUid&&, &&LastActionDate&&, &&DeleteRelated&&, &&CreationDate&&, &&Attempt&&, &&LastUpdateDate&&, &&NextUpdateDate&&, &&ServerConnectionUid&&) SELECT &&Id&&, &&ObjectId&&, &&ObjectTypeUid&&, NULL, (&&DeleteRelated&&::int)::smallint, &&CreationDate&&, 0, NULL, &&NextUpdateDate&&, NULL FROM unnest(tvpTable) AS tvpTable WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM &&HistoryUpdateQueueItem&& WHERE &&ObjectId&& = tvpTable.&&ObjectId&& AND &&ObjectTypeUid&& = tvpTable.&&ObjectTypeUid&& FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED); END $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
